SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package com.unimib.assignment3.POJO

    • Class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Task

      class Task extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • assignedEmployees
          List<Employee> assignedEmployees
          List of employees assigned to this task. Mapped via the 'assignedEmployees' join table.
        • endDate
          LocalDate endDate
          End date of the task.
        • startDate
          LocalDate startDate
          Start date of the task.
        • taskId
          Long taskId
          Task ID. Generated by the database.
        • taskState
          TaskState taskState
          Current state of the task. Enumerated as a string in the database.
        • teamTask
          Team teamTask
          Team assigned to the task. Mapped by the 'teamTask' field.
